name: ExtensionProcedure_Category
title: R5: category
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Procedure.category` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Procedure.category` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Procedure.category` 0..* `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `Procedure.category` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4: `Procedure.category` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Procedure.category` allows multiple values in the source, but is mapped to an element that does not allow multiple values in the target.
Element `Procedure.category` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Procedure.category` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.

element.comment:
Element `Procedure.category` allows multiple values in the source, but is mapped to an element that does not allow multiple values in the target.
Element `Procedure.category` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Procedure.category` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.

element.definition: A code that classifies the procedure for searching, sorting and display purposes (e.g. "Surgical Procedure").
